title: Food+
body:
***! REQUIRES FABRIC API !***


![candy](https://imgur.com/ZTcFwkG.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/sUy6DU2HxVQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**2.3**

![items](https://imgur.com/Lzqmf51.png)

**Mod add more 'vanilla-style' food**


![suspo](https://imgur.com/cNx2NSZ.png)**Small Wiki:**

- The Root can be obtained by right-clicking the sword on the root block
![suspo](https://imgur.com/3w29wHn.png)

- Lichen is extracted from lichen in mines
![rootlichen](https://imgur.com/kuNhTyP.png)

- ![stridermeat](https://imgur.com/uNESl5i.png)Strider Meat is extracted from strider. 
- ![frogleg](https://imgur.com/L7MHf19.png)Frog Leg is extracted from frog.
- ![batwing](https://imgur.com/5NmnE6Q.png)Bat Wing is extracted from Bat. 
- ![turnip](https://imgur.com/yTTJtkb.png)Turnip is extracted from Pitcher Crop.
- ![sniffermeat](https://imgur.com/HB8qrWv.png)Sniffer Meat is extracted from Sniffer. 
- ![medicine](https://imgur.com/YRV2cri.png)Mysterious Medicine give +1 heart. *You can find this in deepslate structures!*



**Support**: Dehydration



_Languages:_

* Russian
* English

This is my first mod :]
